title: [release-1.39] Bump c/image to v5.34.3, c/common v0.62.3, Bulidah v1.39.4
body:
Bump to c/common to v0.62.3 to vendor in c/image v5.34.3.  Also bump Buildah to v1.39.4.

This is the third SIC vendor dance step dance to resolve a DiffID
issue noted in https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-85218 and
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-85219

Creating Bulidah v1.39.4 also gets the fix from https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6089 into that version of the release. This will fix a mount flags issue that @nalind discovered and squashed. This is an important fix for Image Mode in RHEL 9.6 and 10.0.

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-85114, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-85115

This has failed three times already, conformance tests are broken @nalind

Looks like fourth time's a charm.

@nalind @flouthoc Ever seen this failure before? Seems concerning to me that conformance tests are flaky with an error like that.
Oh Joy!  That is concerning, but I'll muddle along with the vendoring into Podman now to wrap up the Jiras.
